title: Users
description: Manage the accounts that can sign in to the clinic. Assign roles to control which modules each person can operate.
search_placeholder: Search by name, email or phone...

row.self_locked: You can't edit or delete your own account from here.
row.superadmin_locked: Superadmin accounts are managed from the seeder.

empty.no_records_description: Create the first user so your team can access the clinic.
empty.no_results_description: No user matches the current filters. Try adjusting the search or changing the status/role.

form.description_create: Fill in the new user's details and assign a role.
form.description_edit: Update the user info or change the assigned role.
form.section_access_hint_create: Set the initial password and the role this account will have.
form.section_access_hint_edit: Change the role or password. Leave the password fields empty to keep the current one.

fields.name: Full name
fields.is_active_hint: If disabled, the user won't be able to sign in.

delete.title: Delete user
delete.description: You're about to delete user {{name}}. They will lose access immediately and their history will remain in the system. This action cannot be undone.
delete.self_blocked: You can't delete your own account.
delete.superadmin_blocked: Superadmin accounts can't be deleted from the panel.

bulk.delete_description: You're about to delete {{count}} users. Superadmin accounts and your own session will be skipped automatically. Deleted users will lose access immediately.
